name: Delete Content — Preview Only (safe)
description: SAFE: exercises the delete-content PREVIEW phase only. With confirm omitted, the tool runs a non-destructive preview (tags the target / mints evidence) and returns a confirm payload WITHOUT deleting. The prompt forbids confirming, so nothing is deleted. Requires ADMIN_TOOLS_ENABLED=true, site-admin PAT, and EVAL_DELETE_WORKBOOK_LUID (a disposable test workbook).
prompt: Use the Tableau MCP server to PREVIEW deleting the workbook with LUID {{env.EVAL_DELETE_WORKBOOK_LUID}}. Only run the preview — do NOT confirm or apply the deletion. Report what the tool says would be deleted and whether it returned a confirmation payload. Do not call any confirm tool and do not re-call with confirm=true.
